instruction: Change picture's height to 20, 30, 25cm on slide 3, 4, 6 respectively.

evaluator._config_note: CRITICAL: examine_shape must be False for examine_modify_height to work. Due to execution order, examine_shape check happens before examine_modify_height, so any shape dimension mismatch will cause immediate failure before examine_modify_height logic is reached.
evaluator.eval: compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/30_1.pptx', 'dest': '30_1.pptx'}), expected=get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/7ae48c60-f143-4119-b659-15b8f485eb9a/30_1_Gold.pptx', 'dest': '30_1_Gold.pptx'}), examine_modify_height=True, examine_shape=False) or compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/30_1.pptx', 'dest': '30_1.pptx'}), expected=get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_impress/7ae48c60-f143-4119-b659-15b8f485eb9a/30_1_Gold_all_fonts.pptx', 'dest': '30_1_Gold_all_fonts.pptx'}), examine_modify_height=True, examine_shape=False)
